t: Book Tracker: Using Evaluations to evaluate an intelligent feature
a: Measure and improve the quality of your app’s intelligence-powered features using the Evaluations framework.

t: Designing datasets to test your feature
a: Build categorized test datasets that reflect the full range of real-world use of your feature.
Design evaluations that tell you how well your feature works, why it fails, and where to focus next.
Configure model-as-judge evaluators that produce scores you correlate with human review.

t: Designing specific, measurable criteria in an evaluation suite
a: Define quality for your feature by choosing measurable criteria, scoring approaches, and ground-truth strategies.
Build an evaluation that runs your intelligence-powered feature against samples and scores each response.
Analyze your model’s tool calls against expected trajectories, argument values, and call ordering.
